message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'ratelimit_state_exit' sets signal field 'ratelimit_state.missed', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=ratelimit_state;field=missed;offset=16] [oracle:assert=ratelimit_state.missed stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets missed without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
